description: A designed official quote card with a solid medium-blue background. At the top center is a circular cropped headshot portrait of a middle-aged man in a dark suit with a red-and-white striped tie, standing in front of an American flag and a blue flag. Below, set between large light-blue decorative quotation marks, white serif text reads: 'ICE alone has arrested over 65,000 illegal aliens — including 2,288 gang members from Tren de Aragua, MS-13, 18th Street and other gangs.' The attribution beneath reads '— TODD LYONS' with 'ICE Acting Director' in italics. The bottom right shows the DHS seal and the large white 'ICE' wordmark. This is part of a 'FIRST 100 DAYS' series touting enforcement statistics. The propaganda technique uses an authoritative leadership portrait plus a direct quote and large hard numbers (65,000 arrests; 2,288 gang members) to project effectiveness and tie immigration enforcement to combating named violent gangs. Target audience: general public and media, to demonstrate the administration's enforcement results.
notable_text: ICE alone has arrested over 65,000 illegal aliens — including 2,288 gang members from Tren de Aragua, MS-13, 18th Street and other gangs. — TODD LYONS, ICE Acting Director
